series_metadata.series_title: Law Enforcement Automated Data Systems (LEADS) Printouts
series_metadata.series_description: Printouts of information from the Law Enforcement Automated Data Systems (LEADS) used for reference purposes in investigative work by Health Care Fraud section. Information on printouts may include, but are not limited to, driver's license information, Bureau of Motor Vehicle information, and criminal record checks.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain until no longer of administrative value, then dispose of immediately., Paper: Shred
